news.title:

This complies with SEBI guidelines under circular dated October 2025.

news.title:
Metal stocks like NALCO, Hindustan Zinc, and Tata Steel nosedived due to weak global cues and gas supply concerns.
Sensex dropped over 900 points, Nifty fell 300 points, marking a third consecutive session of losses.

news.title:
Tata Steel Ltd faces GST demand of ₹493.35 crore, penalty of ₹638.82 crore.
Company challenges CGST commissioner's order in Jharkhand High Court, citing merit.
news.summary:

news.title:
Punjab to showcase Rs 27,294 crore investments at Progressive Punjab Summit with 30 projects creating 47,067 jobs.
Key projects include Tata Steel's Rs 3,200 crore Ludhiana plant and Infosys' Rs 286 crore Mohali campus expansion.
news.summary:

news.title:
CCI probes Tata Steel, JSW Steel, SAIL, and RINL for alleged cartel behavior via WhatsApp chats and production cuts.
Investigation reveals synchronized price changes, controlled production cuts, implicating top executives; firms deny wrongdoing.
news.summary:
CCI probes Tata Steel, JSW Steel, SAIL, and RINL for alleged cartel behavior via WhatsApp chats and production cuts.

news.title:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.

news.title:

news.title:

The acquisition boosts IMFA's capacity to 1.5 lakh tpa, making it India's largest ferro-chrome producer.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel acquires 261.9 crore shares in T Steel Holdings Pte. Ltd for $264M (₹2,401.5 crore).
Post-acquisition, T Steel Holdings remains wholly owned by Tata Steel. Disclosure complies with SEBI LODR regulations.
